function.message: I can’t safely complete this yet: I could not find canonical project records matching “kid print project” or “BlueMesa Quotebook,” so I can’t determine which started earlier or delete a project without guessing. Please provide the exact project folder names (under 40_projects) to compare.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read workflow guidance for inbox processing, treated inbox as request not canonical truth, verified against canonical projects lane, and avoided mutation when canonical support was missing.
function.outcome_justification: The request depends on identifying two specific projects and their start dates. Canonical project records are in 40_projects/*/README.MD, but searches found no canonical project matches for the provided names. Without exact project identities, deleting any project would require guessing, so clarification is required.
